evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about SPF setup
evals.prompt: I need to set up email authentication for my new domain. Where do I start with SPF?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks why emails go to spam
evals.prompt: Our marketing emails keep landing in Gmail spam. How do I diagnose this?

evals.description: Agent can generate a correct DMARC record for monitoring phase
evals.prompt: Generate a DMARC DNS record for example.com in monitoring mode that sends aggregate reports to dmarc@example.com

evals.description: Agent provides a correct IP warm-up schedule for a new sender
evals.prompt: We just got a new dedicated IP for sending 50K marketing emails per day. Create a warm-up plan.

evals.description: Agent correctly explains the SPF 10-lookup limit
evals.prompt: My SPF record has 12 includes and emails are failing SPF checks. What's wrong?

evals.description: Agent generates correct DKIM DNS record format
evals.prompt: Show me what the DKIM DNS TXT record looks like for selector 'mail1' on domain example.com

evals.description: Agent correctly classifies bounce types and recommends actions
evals.prompt: We're getting a mix of 550 5.1.1 and 452 4.2.2 bounces. What do each of these mean and what should we do?
What's the difference between relaxed and strict DMARC alignment? Which should I use?

evals.description: Agent warns against skipping warm-up and buying lists
evals.prompt: We just bought a list of 500K emails and want to send a blast from our new IP today. How do we set this up?

evals.description: Agent handles Spamhaus blocklist delisting correctly
evals.prompt: Our sending IP just got listed on Spamhaus SBL. How do we get delisted?

evals.description: Agent does not invent a universal reputation API that does not exist
evals.prompt: Is there a single API I can call to get my universal sender reputation score across all providers?

evals.description: Agent references the bounce-handling reference file for detailed bounce codes
evals.prompt: I need a complete reference of all SMTP bounce codes and what to do with each one. Give me everything.
